hero.title: Gather Around a Steaming Pot of Comfort
hero.subtitle: Experience the refined flavors of traditional hot pot in a warm, modern setting.

featured.name: Sichuan Fiery Broth
featured.desc: A bold, fiery kick from 12 rare herbs and spices, delivering an explosive flavor experience.

space.title: A Place That Brings Families Together
space.desc: At Sizzling Hearth, we believe every meal is a chance to connect. Our space blends warm, earthy tones with a modern touch traditional charm, offering guests total relaxation.

features.title: Elegant Private Rooms
features.desc: Perfect for family gatherings or hosting business partners.

features.title: Open-Air Terrace
features.desc: Airy and close to nature, ideal for a relaxed weekend evening.

items.quote: The broth here is truly different, with a naturally sweet flavor from long-simmered bones. The wagyu beef is fresh and perfectly sliced. Definitely coming back!
items.name: Mr. Tuan

items.quote: The space is incredibly cozy, and the staff are attentive and warm. Very happy with the service quality at Sizzling Hearth.
items.name: Ms. Lan Huong

items.quote: The ideal spot for company gatherings. Food is diverse, from seafood to hot pot vegetables, everything is fresh.
items.name: Mr. Minh Hoang
